description: Deepika Padukone and Ranveer Singh are expecting their second child, with Deepika sharing a cute social media post hinting at her baby bump. The couple, married in 2018 in Italy, already welcomed daughter Dua in 2024, and fans are thrilled as their family grows once again.

Maharashtra couple fight over half-cooked mutton, woman later kills herself
description: A Yavatmal homemaker died after consuming poison. Chetana Jadhav reportedly took the extreme step following an argument with her husband over undercooked mutton. The dispute occurred in front of a guest. Chetana felt humiliated and consumed poison later. She was rushed to the hospital but declared dead. Police have registered a case against her husband.

title: Aryna Sabalenka’s fiancé Georgios Frangulis hits back at critics over match presence
description: Georgios Frangulis responded strongly to critics questioning his presence at Aryna Sabalenka’s matches. In a podcast video, he explained how he balances work and support for his fiancé. Sabalenka also shared how the relationship has shaped her mindset. Meanwhile, she continues a strong tennis season despite a recent injury forcing her to miss the Stuttgart Open.

title: OpenAI exec Srinivas Narayanan leaves to spend time with ageing parents in India
description: Srinivas Narayanan, OpenAI's CTO for B2B applications, is departing the company next week after nearly three years. He plans to visit his parents in India before considering future professional endeavors. Narayanan, who previously served as VP of Engineering, shared his departure on LinkedIn, calling his tenure at the AI firm 'three incredible years'.

title: Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld step out glowing after welcoming their first child
description: NFL star Josh Allen and actress Hailee Steinfeld welcomed their baby daughter, sharing the joyous news on Thursday. Just a day later, the new parents made a dazzling appearance at Josh's best friend Sam Darnold's wedding. The couple, radiating happiness, celebrated with fellow NFL players, even sharing baby photos, proving they can balance new parenthood with social commitments.
